_comment: Copy to webapp_config.json (gitignored) or let the webapp create it. All keys are optional — missing keys fall back to src/webapp_config.py defaults. Non-secret host/port/enabled also live in config/default.json under 'webapp'; values here win.
_comment_auth_token: Empty = auth gate OFF (default). Run scripts/gen_token.py to generate one; the webapp then requires Authorization: Bearer <token> on every non-loopback API call.
_comment_auth_password: Optional companion to auth_token: a fresh device with no token shows a login overlay; the password swaps for the bearer token. Set/clear via scripts/set_password.py. Failed attempts log to webapp/auth.log.
_comment_tailnet_allowlist: Extra IPs / CIDRs allowed to reach the passkey endpoints on top of loopback + the Tailscale CGNAT range 100.64.0.0/10. Leave empty unless you need LAN access.
_comment_webauthn: Passkey gate. webauthn_rp_id is the bare tailnet hostname (e.g. 'pc.tailnet.ts.net'); webauthn_origin is the full https origin the phone connects to (e.g. 'https://pc.tailnet.ts.net:8455'). Leave both empty to disable the passkey gate.
_comment_telegram: Digest delivery secrets (migrated off .env in Step 3). The CLI and webapp both read these. Obtain them per docs/bootstrapping.md step 4.
